name: sidebar
title: Sidebar
description: Full-height navigation sidebar with collapsible sections, composable item badges, provider pattern for external control, and collapsed mode. 11 composable parts, 2 context providers.

content.text: useSidebar must be used within a SidebarProvider or Sidebar
SidebarSection compound components must be used within a SidebarSection

docs.description: Full-height navigation sidebar with collapsible sections, composable item badges, provider pattern for external control, and collapsed mode. 11 composable parts, 2 context providers.

anatomy.name: SidebarProvider
anatomy.note: Optional wrapper for external sidebar control (collapsed state)

anatomy.name: Sidebar
anatomy.note: Root nav element (standalone or within SidebarProvider)

anatomy.name: SidebarSection
anatomy.note: Grouping container (optional collapsible, supports controlled open/onOpenChange)

anatomy.name: SidebarItem
anatomy.note: Clickable nav item with active state and render-prop support

anatomy.name: SidebarItemLabel
anatomy.note: Truncated text label slot for SidebarItem

anatomy.name: SidebarTrigger
anatomy.note: Toggle button for sidebar collapsed state (use within SidebarProvider)

notes.title: SidebarProvider
notes.content: Wrap both Sidebar and your main content in SidebarProvider to control collapsed state from outside the sidebar. Use the useSidebar() hook to read/toggle state from any child component. When Sidebar is used without a provider, it manages its own state.

notes.title: Collapsible Sections
notes.content: SidebarSection accepts collapsible={true} to enable expand/collapse. Supports controlled state via open/onOpenChange props. SidebarSectionTitle renders a toggle arrow. When collapsed, SidebarItems inside the section are hidden.

notes.title: Item Badge Part
notes.content: Use SidebarItemBadge inside SidebarItem for trailing labels like 'new' or counts. This keeps badge semantics explicit and styling predictable.

notes.title: Collapsed Mode
notes.content: Sidebar supports a collapsed prop (controlled or uncontrolled via defaultCollapsed) that signals the sidebar should render in a compact state. Child components can read this via useSidebar().

notes.title: Dual Context
notes.content: SidebarProvider or Sidebar provides SidebarContext (collapsed state) at the root level. SidebarSection provides SidebarSectionContext (open/closed state) for its children. SidebarItem reads the section context to hide itself when the section is collapsed.

notes.title: Item Render Props
notes.content: SidebarItem supports render-prop children for custom elements (e.g., framework Link components). The render function receives ref, className, disabled, and aria-current props.
